footer.tagline: An audio platform for those who are not afraid of silence. Original horror stories, 3D binaural sound, voices that stay with you.
footer.newsletter_desc: Every Thursday, at 11 PM. New stories and behind-the-scenes.
footer.copyright: © 2021–2026 OBSKURA AUDIO SP. Z O.O. · ALL VOICES RESERVED

hero.desc: is an audio platform for those who don't fear silence. Original horror stories, 3D binaural sound and voices that stay with you long after you take off your headphones.

player.ep_meta: Narrator: K. Wieczorek · Dir. M. Sobczak

featured.desc: Psychological noir in seven parts. A journalist discovers that every night conversation with an anonymous informant leaves a trace — a physical trace that cannot be washed off.

tweaks.title: TWEAKS · A/B
tweaks.hint_portrait: First version — portrait with radial mask, two-column composition with text + meta on the sides.
tweaks.hint_wide: Second version — wide cinematic with harbor, monster centered, text on the left with gradient.

login.sub: Log in to continue your stories and unlock new episodes.
login.quote: Every story you listen to leaves a trace. Some return in dreams.

register.quote: "After the first episode I couldn't sleep for a week. I came back for more."
register.step1_sub: Create an account and unlock 147 original stories. First month free.
register.pw_hint: Use an uppercase letter, a digit and a special character
register.step2_sub: Pick at least 1 genre. The algorithm will pair stories to every night.
register.step3_sub: Last step. You can stay anonymous — a nickname is enough.
register.name_hint: Other listeners will see this name next to your comments.
register.terms: I accept the terms of service and privacy policy. I understand the content may not be suitable for people under 16.
register.newsletter_optin: Sign me up for the newsletter (Thursdays 23:00, new stories and behind-the-scenes)
register.success_sub: Your first episode is waiting. Put on headphones, kill the lights and let them find you.

archive.lead: The full Obskura catalogue — from the first episode ("Silence at Mokotów", 2021) to today's premiere. Filter by genre, recording date, narrator. Sort however you want.
archive.no_results_sub: Try a different filter or search term.

club.sub: Three plans. All ad-free, all in binaural 3D. They differ in how much you want to take with you into the night.
club.all_taxes: ALL PRICES INCLUDE VAT · AUTOMATIC INVOICES
club.save_text_yearly: You pay {{total}} PLN yearly — you save {{save}} PLN
club.extra1_desc: Once a month — a conversation with the narrator, sound director or screenwriter. No camera, no Zoom face. Just voice, your questions, their answers. The recording stays in the member archive.
club.extra2_desc: Every quarter we put four ideas up for a vote on what to produce next. Your vote counts. The winning theme reaches the script within 6 months. In the end credits — your (or anonymous) name.
club.extra3_desc: Once a year we send a physical book: 12 best transcripts of the season, illustrations, director notes, location map. 250 pages print, linen binding, numbered edition. Only for the Clan.
club.extra4_desc: Each episode has a second ending that's not in the public version. Sometimes gentler, sometimes more brutal. You decide after the first listen.
club.cta_desc: Try everything — all 147 stories, binaural 3D, exclusive behind-the-scenes. If you don't like it (unlikely), you click cancel. No questions asked.
club.cta_btn: Create account and pick a plan
club.trust: 47,800 PEOPLE IN THE CLUB · 4.9 ★ ON APPLE PODCASTS · 0% RETENTION AFTER CANCEL

episode.desc: Port hydrophones record an anomaly at 17.8 Hz. No one wants to talk about it. Reporter Eliza descends into the tunnel beneath the pier — and starts hearing what air pressure should never carry.
episode.transcript_lock: Full transcript for Solo and Clan plans.

common.coming_soon_desc: Full view appears soon. All links work, layout is ready — copy and components land here iteratively.

aplikacja.lead: The whole platform in the app — offline, binaural 3D, sleep timer, resume listening across devices. No ads, no tracking, 27 MB.
aplikacja.qr_desc: Point your camera at the code, tap the banner — we automatically open the app page in the right store. No separate scanner app to install.

forum.eyebrow: // FORUM · A PLACE FOR RESTLESS QUESTIONS
forum.lead: A forum for Obskura listeners. No political brawls, no context-free creepypasta. Moderated by our team, not by an algorithm. Join in — log in with your Obskura account.

kariera.hero_eyebrow: // CAREERS · A TEAM OF 14 · GROWING CAREFULLY
kariera.hero_lead: We're not looking for 50 people. We're looking for 3 who truly fit. No free massages or foosball — but we have our own recording studio, great gear, 25 days of leave and people who won't pretend to like you if they don't.
kariera.nofit_p: If you feel you fit Obskura but none of the open positions, write to us. We usually open new roles every 3 months — before opening we review applications from the "reserve".
kariera.perk1_p: 5 extra "free thought" days — no questions, no explanations, no calendar.
kariera.perk2_p: Since January 2024. Thursday = Friday. Same pay. We're not experimenting — this is now our standard.
kariera.perk3_p: Every employee has studio access outside working hours. Own projects, podcast, demo — our gear is yours too.
kariera.perk4_p: 3,500 zł onboarding (reference headphones + monitor) + 1,200 zł a year for upgrades.
kariera.perk5_p: LUX MED Premium + 600 zł a year for physiotherapy (sound work easily gives you a stiff neck).
kariera.perk6_p: Multisport Plus, 200 zł / month for books (our choice: paper, not audiobooks).
kariera.perk7_p: Your pick — Audiocraft, Sound on Sound, BBC R&D. We cover everything + 2 days of sightseeing.
kariera.perk8_p: 2 days / month you can work in our Kraków or Warsaw studio. Because sometimes you need a different window.
kariera.perk9_p: Your name in the credits of every episode you worked on. We don't hide the team.
kariera.process_eyebrow: HIRING PROCESS · 4 STEPS · 18 DAYS ON AVERAGE
kariera.process_lead: We don't use an ATS, we don't sort CVs by keywords. We read every application. We reply to everyone — even if it's a "not this time".
kariera.role1_sub: Binaural mix, post-production, close collaboration with Piotr Górski. Full-time.
kariera.role2_sub: Writing episode scripts (40–90 min). Two confirmed episodes + options. Specialty: psychological + true horror.
kariera.role3_sub: Running recording sessions, working with actors, mix supervisor. Successor to M. Sobczak on selected episodes.
kariera.role4_sub: Moderating the forum, Discord channels, answering knowledge-base tickets. 4-day week, night shifts.
kariera.step1_p: A short letter (up to 400 words — "why me, why now") + portfolio / work sample in the format suited to the role.
kariera.step2_p: 45–60 min with someone who works in a similar position. Concretely about the work, no "tell me your journey". No logic tests.
kariera.step3_p: A small task similar to what you'll be doing. 4–8h. We pay 800 zł flat (not "at market rate"). Your work stays yours.
kariera.step4_p: 2h in our studio (if you can come) or online. You meet the 4–5 people you'll work with. Offer in 48h.
kariera.val1_anti: if you love the "whole team in one room, music in the background, constant chatter" energy. We switch that off.
kariera.val1_p: We have no open space. Everyone has their own room or studio. Focus has a physical place. Slack only for coordination, not for chit-chat.
kariera.val2_anti: if you're driven by move-fast-break-things. Here we do the opposite.
kariera.val2_p: Every major decision goes through a 48-hour pause. No ideas thrown out in a meeting and approved the same week. Everything important is written down.
kariera.val3_anti: if you prefer to negotiate individually and make sure colleagues don't know what you earn.
kariera.val3_p: All salaries are in an internal table visible to everyone. Because you should know what the person next to you earns. Raises — by formula, twice a year.
kariera.val4_anti: if you want to show off the "I work through the night" angle. This is no place for heroic overtime.
kariera.val4_p: 25 days of leave plus 5 "free thought" days (no questions, no explanations). 4-day week since 2024, Thursday = Friday. After 18:00 the phone is off — an iron rule.

konto.audio_autoplay_desc: When an episode ends — automatically start the next one in the series.
konto.audio_bass_desc: Extra boost for infrasound (17–25 Hz). Recommended on planar/over-ear headphones.
konto.audio_desc: Playback configuration. Changes save automatically and sync across devices.
konto.audio_intro_desc: Every episode has an "intro" chapter (~30s) and an "outro" (~45s). You can skip them automatically.
konto.audio_quality_desc: FLAC available only on the Clan plan. Higher quality = more data (FLAC ~100 MB/h).
konto.audio_skip_desc: Seek buttons in the player. Shorter = more precise.
konto.favs_desc: Liked, added to library, marked for a re-listen.
konto.history_desc: Your recent listens. Sorting and filters above.
konto.notif_desc: Push, email and in-app notifications. Every setting separate.
konto.notif_event_desc: 2h before a live event starts (AMA, online premieres).
konto.notif_news_desc: Every Thursday at 23:00. Unsubscribe with one click.
konto.notif_premiere_desc: Notification about a new episode — push, email or both.
konto.notif_quiet_desc: No push notifications between 23:00 — 07:00. Even though Obskura listens best at night.
konto.notif_reply_desc_p1: Someone replies in a thread you joined.
konto.plan_card_desc: All 147 episodes, premieres 72h before public release, 320 kbps quality, two active sessions at once, Discord, exclusive behind-the-scenes.
konto.plan_clan_desc_p1: Access for the whole family (6 devices, 5 profiles), lossless FLAC, premieres 7 days earlier, annual physical book. Extra
konto.plan_desc: Full subscription management. All changes take effect immediately.
konto.plan_patron_desc: Patrons get everything + their name in the credits + influence on production. Season 04 begins in June 2026.
konto.privacy_analytics_desc: We count visits without identifying any individual. Hosted in the EU.
konto.privacy_delete_note: 30-day grace period — you can undo the decision. After 30 days data is permanently erased from databases and backups. Invoices (5 years) — required by law.
konto.privacy_desc: All the data we hold about you. Export, control, deletion.
konto.privacy_export_note: Your export is ready within 7 business days (usually faster). You'll get an email with a link (valid for 30 days).
konto.privacy_recommend_desc_p1: The algorithm picks stories for you based on what you've listened to.
konto.profile_anon_desc_b: Comments, likes, stats — without a nickname.
konto.profile_avatar_note: Avatar generated from the first letter. You can upload your own.
konto.profile_comments_desc: Your nickname shown next to your comments on episodes and the forum.
konto.profile_desc: Information visible to other listeners in comments and on the forum.
konto.profile_stats_desc: Others can see how many episodes you've heard, favorite genres, daily average.
konto.security_alert_p1: Yesterday at 14:23 someone tried to log in from a device in Berlin. The attempt was blocked. If this wasn't you —
konto.security_desc: Password, 2FA, devices, security alerts. Check every month.
konto.security_login_desc: An email on every login from a new device / location.
konto.security_pw_desc_p2: We recommend changing it every 6 months.

newsletter.card_sub: No card, no fees. Just an email. You can unsubscribe anytime — with one click.
newsletter.consent: I agree to receive messages from OBSKURA. I can opt out at any time.
newsletter.hero_lead: A newsletter for those who listen to stories on the way home at three in the morning. Every Thursday we send you a new episode before its premiere, behind-the-scenes, and one short piece that won't let you sleep.
newsletter.preview_body_1: Last Wednesday we locked ourselves in the studio with Katarzyna Wieczorek for six hours. We didn't come out happy. This morning we came out with something that works. You're hearing it first.
newsletter.preview_body_2: In this issue you'll find the episode "Fog over Wisłoujście", a short note on why we cut an entire basement scene (and why it was necessary), plus a 500-word piece from M. Sobczak — our resident sound director.
newsletter.preview_body_3: That's everything you get from us today. The next issue lands Thursday at 23:00. If you like, you can reply to this email — we read every one.
newsletter.preview_subject_val: Something wants to come back — episode 12 is yours
newsletter.success_sub_p1: We've sent an activation link to
newsletter.success_sub_p2: It may land in SPAM — that's a good sign.

onboarding.audio_question_p1: "Which side do you hear the voice whispering
onboarding.audio_sub_p2: you'll hear a short sound panned binaurally. Tell us which side you hear the voice from — that's enough to calibrate the 3D mix.
onboarding.audio_tip_b: with the right and left sides in the correct ears
onboarding.audio_tip_p1: If you hear the voice only in the center, check that your headphones are connected
onboarding.first_rec_desc: A patient in a psychiatric ward in room 304 sees something in the mirror. Only at night. Only when the corridor's back light is on. The nurse says they're hallucinations. The patient says it isn't her doing the looking.
onboarding.first_sub_p3: we picked this episode for you. Put on headphones, kill the lights. 47 minutes. Let's begin.
onboarding.genres_sub_p2: max 8. The algorithm will match stories to you. You can change this later in settings.
onboarding.welcome_sub_p1: Before you hand us your headphones, we want to know
onboarding.welcome_sub_p3: Four questions, one short sound test, and a first episode picked for you.
onboarding.when_sub: We'll set premiere notifications for this hour. Without waking you in the middle of the day.

patroni.faq1_a: One-off — for a single season (usually 12 episodes over 6 months). When the season ends you can, but don't have to, support the next one. No auto-renewal, no "dark patterns".
patroni.faq2_a: 30 days from the first payment — a full refund, no questions. After that — prorated to what's already been recorded. Write to pomoc@obskura.audio and it's settled in 48h.
patroni.faq3_a: Yes. At checkout you tick "anonymous" and you appear in the credits as "Anonymous #042". 38% of our patrons choose this option — mostly people from industries where publicly backing horror would be awkward. We respect that.
patroni.faq4_a: Executive producer — yes (we issue an invoice, you get your logo in the credits as "presented by"). Witness and Ally — we prefer private individuals, but we'll take a company too. Get in touch via patroni@obskura.audio.
patroni.lead: Patrons are something other than the Club. The Club is a subscription. Patrons are the people who fund a specific season, get their name in the end credits and decide what we record six months from now.
patroni.t1_f1: Access to all of season 04 30 days before premiere
patroni.t1_f3: Your (or anonymous) name in the credits
patroni.t1_f5: Digital "zine" — a 24-page PDF with notes from the set
patroni.t2_f2: Your name in the credits of every episode (audio + written)
patroni.t2_f3: Access to scripts 30 days before recording
patroni.t2_f4: An advisory voice — you comment on scripts before the mix
patroni.t2_f5: Physical bundle: poster, stickers, keepsake cassette
patroni.t2_f6: 1× one-on-one meeting with any narrator (45 min)
patroni.t3_f2: "Executive producer" in the credits + on the site
patroni.t3_f3: Pick one episode out of 3 proposals to record
patroni.t3_f4: A studio visit + taking part in one recording session
patroni.t3_f5: Numbered copy of the season's 12" vinyl soundtrack
patroni.vs_klub_p: A monthly or yearly subscription. You get the whole catalogue, lossless quality, exclusive content, no ads. The Club funds the team's daily work. Cancel anytime.
patroni.vs_patron_p: A one-off payment toward a specific season. You get everything the Club Clan offers + direct influence on production, access to scripts at the writing stage, your name in the credits of every episode of the season.
patroni.wall_meta: NAMES APPEAR IN EVERY EPISODE OF THE SEASON · ANONYMOUS = NUMBER ONLY · NO PRESSURE

playerpage.note1: Hydrophones recorded in February 2026 in Gdańsk — Piotr recorded from the pier at night for 4 hours.
playerpage.note2: The fog in the mix = a recording of real fog + 8 layers of pink noise processed through convolution reverb from the cathedral in Oliwa.
playerpage.note3: KEY MOMENT — Katarzyna recorded breathing in a pool. 45 seconds. She came out blue.

prasa.about_p1: is an independent studio recording original audio horror in Polish. Founded in 2021 in Gdańsk by Marta Sobczak (formerly Trójka, BBC Sounds) and Piotr Górski (sound engineer).
prasa.about_p2c: and long, narrative episodes (40–90 min). Each episode is an original script, recorded in one of our three studios in Gdańsk, Warsaw and Kraków.
prasa.about_p3: We've created 147 episodes across 3 seasons. We're heard in 67 countries. We work with 38 narrators. We have 2.4M monthly listeners and a club of 47,800 paying members.
prasa.about_p4c: Every episode mixed to binaural 3D (8 tracks, sometimes 16), recorded in a single take with actors in a physical space, not in a voiceover booth.
prasa.about_p5b: The Club, patrons and short self-promos — we're funded only by the people who listen to us.
prasa.about_quote: We don't record horror. We record the silence in which you can hear that someone is there.
prasa.cov1: The best Polish audio in years. You hear every breath, every whisper. Headphones mandatory.
prasa.cov2: Obskura is doing for audio horror what Netflix did for series — proving the genre can be art.
prasa.cov3: I didn't sleep for three days after "Patient 23". Something in that sound is just inhuman.
prasa.cov4: A small team, enormous quality. The most promising independent player in audio on the market today.
prasa.cov5: Polish horror audio that rivals anything coming out of the UK or US. Get your headphones ready.
prasa.cov6: A standard-setting work in binaural narrative. The kind of show you'll want to listen to in the dark.
prasa.dl1_p: Main logo, mark, monochrome and inverted versions. Vector + raster up to 4K.
prasa.dl2_p: A one-page summary of the company, facts and team. In Polish and English.
prasa.dl3_p: 56 high-resolution photos — creator portraits, recording sessions, the mix.
prasa.dl4_p: 10 minutes from 5 episodes — can be quoted directly on air or in an online article.
prasa.dl5_p: iOS / Android / Web — all screens in dark mode. Mockups to place in an article.
prasa.dl6_p: Typography, colors, logo usage, tone of communication. A full manual for editors and partners.
prasa.hero_lead: Logos, facts, contacts, ready-made quotes. If something isn't here — write to us, we'll deliver in 24h. All materials available license-free for press and criticism.
prasa.rel1_p: The premiere of the 12th episode of season 3 closes the year's production cycle. The full press kit includes the script, photos from the set, and a longer interview with director Marta Sobczak.
prasa.rel2_h1: Obskura signs a distribution deal with
prasa.rel2_p: 4 episodes of season 3 (EN versions) will go to BBC Sounds as an exchange — in return BBC Sounds will share 3 British audio productions with Polish listeners.
prasa.rel3_p: Obskura wins two awards at the 35th KTR — for the series "Patient 23" (best audio) and the mix of the episode "The Chain of Fenrir" (Piotr Górski, best mix).
prasa.rel4_p: The third season kicks off with the premiere of "The Engine Room" on February 14. Detailed plan, premiere schedule and narrator list.
prasa.stat1: 3 seasons since 2021. Average length: 56 min. Longest: 2h 14min ("The Chain of Fenrir").
prasa.stat2: Active listeners (at least 1 episode finished). 67 countries. Most: PL, DE, UK.
prasa.stat3: Club subscribers (Threshold / Solo / Clan) + seasonal Patrons. 73% yearly, 27% monthly.
prasa.stat4: 147,800 ratings. #1 in the "Drama" category in PL for 14 months. Top 5 EU.
prasa.stat5: 12 regular, 26 guest. All recordings in PL, 4 episodes tested in EN.
prasa.stat6: Gdańsk (main), Warsaw (mix), Kraków (foley). 14 people on the technical team.
prasa.stat7: That's what we pay actors, screenwriters, directors. The highest rates in Polish audio.
prasa.stat8: Grand Press Digital '24, KTR '25 (3×), Webby Honoree '24, Press Club Polska '23, '24.

spotkania.feat_kicker: AMA · KATARZYNA WIECZOREK · NARRATOR OF SEASON 03
spotkania.feat_p: An open meeting with Katarzyna Wieczorek after the third season finale. 90 minutes of conversation — about how she prepares for a scene, why she stays silent on the first day in the studio, what she does when a recording doesn't work. We collect your questions until May 30 in a forum thread.
spotkania.lead: Once a month we host a meeting — with a narrator, director, screenwriter. Sometimes in the studio, sometimes in a cinema, sometimes online at three in the morning. No lectures, just a conversation about why something came to someone in a dream.
spotkania.past1_p: Obskura's sound engineer on why we mix in 7.1, when we use hydrophones, and how to record breathing without breathing.
spotkania.past2_p: The first public listen of episode 8 of season 3. A screening in total darkness + Q&A with director T. Reich and a mythology expert from UJ.
spotkania.past3_p: The only public conversation so far with our most mysterious narrator. Voice only, no camera, no real name.
spotkania.title_p2: Look each other in the eye.

tworcy.apply_p: We accept applications once a quarter. We're looking for people whose voice stays after the last word — narrators, screenwriters, sound directors, voice actors. Experience helps, but hearing the silence matters more.
tworcy.c1_bio: Theatre and radio actress. Specializes in women's voices in borderline situations.
tworcy.c2_bio: Co-founder of Obskura. Directs 90% of episodes. Previously Trójka, BBC Sounds.
tworcy.c3_bio: Architect of binaural space. Each mix takes 40h of work. He loves it.
tworcy.c4_bio: Former Gazeta Wyborcza journalist. The voice of the "True Horror" series — based on facts.
tworcy.c5_bio: Wrote for CD Projekt and Bloober Team. At Obskura he handles psychological and cosmic.
tworcy.c6_bio: Linguist, speaks four languages. Lead in season 2 — folk horror and mythology genres.
tworcy.c7_bio: Specialty: Slavic and Norse mythology. Consults with ethnographers from UJ.
tworcy.c8_bio: A pseudonym. Anonymous. The voice for cyber-horror and body horror. Gives no interviews.
tworcy.eyebrow: // THE PEOPLE BEHIND THE VOICES · 38 PEOPLE · 12 REGULARS
tworcy.f_about_ph: Who are you, what scares you, what do you want to tell?
tworcy.f_consent: I agree to the processing of my personal data for recruitment purposes.
tworcy.f_link_label: Link to a sample (Dropbox / SoundCloud / WeTransfer)
tworcy.f_submitted: ✓ Application received — we'll be in touch in 4 weeks
tworcy.feat_p1: After ten years in Trójka's radio theatre, Katarzyna joined Obskura in 2023 with a simple rule — she doesn't read, she tells. She starts every recording with an hour of silence in the studio. She ends each one with a conversation with the director about what went wrong.
tworcy.feat_p2: "In the third season I ran out of air in the middle of the fifth episode. We left that recording in the final version. You can hear that I'm not lying."
tworcy.form_sub: All fields required. Time to fill in: ~6 min.
tworcy.lead: We don't have stars, we have people. Directors, narrators, writers and sound engineers who spend nights over a single breath between two words. See who stands behind every episode that won't let you sleep.
tworcy.quote: The hardest part is telling a story in a whisper without rustling. That patience is what we were taught.
tworcy.step1_text: — 5–10 minutes of your work. It can be from theatre, a podcast, an audiobook, even TikTok. Format: MP3 or WAV.
tworcy.step2_text: — who you are, what you want to tell, what scares you. 300 words is enough.
tworcy.step3_text: . We reply within 4 weeks. If we start a conversation — we propose a test recording.

wsparcie.ch5_meta: WE ARE NOT A CRISIS LINE
wsparcie.contact_info: We have a small support team (5 people). Each of us listens to our own stories and each replies in person. No bots, no templates, no "we've logged your ticket".
wsparcie.faq10_a: Some are — we tag them TRUE HORROR. Most are fiction, but often inspired by news reports or documents. Each episode is assigned a type ("original fiction", "inspired by facts", "documentary").
wsparcie.faq10_q: Are the stories based on facts?
wsparcie.faq11_a: We accept applications once a quarter. See the Creators page — there's a form there. We require an audio sample (5–10 min) and a short description of what you want to tell. We reply to everyone.
wsparcie.faq11_q: How do I become a narrator / creator at Obskura?
wsparcie.faq12_a: Yes — we use an external mailbox pomysly@obskura.audio with separate terms (it protects you and us legally). We read every one, but only reply when we start work on a specific idea (max 1–2 times a year).
wsparcie.faq12_q: I have an idea for a story. Can I send it to you?
wsparcie.faq1_a: Most often it's a weak connection. Try downloading the episode in the app for offline (the ↓ icon next to the title). If you're listening on a computer, check the 320 kbps quality in settings and turn off "Adaptive". If the problem persists after switching to mobile data — let us know, we'll check the CDN in your region.
wsparcie.faq1_q: The audio stutters / quality drops in the middle of an episode. What do I do?
wsparcie.faq2_a: Binaural sound works only on headphones. On speakers the effect fades. If you're using headphones and still hear plain stereo: in iOS settings turn off Spatial Audio (Apple), and on Android turn off Dolby Atmos — they "override" our mix.
wsparcie.faq2_q: 3D / binaural sound doesn't work — I hear plain stereo.
wsparcie.faq3_a: Versions 4.2.1 (iOS) and 4.1.8 (Android) had a bug at startup after the overnight sync. Updating to 4.2.3+ fixes it. If you can't update — a force quit + restart usually does the trick.
wsparcie.faq4_a: Go to Account → Subscription → Cancel. One click. We don't ask "are you sure?". We don't show screens begging you to stay. You keep access until the end of the paid period.
wsparcie.faq4_q: How do I cancel my subscription?
wsparcie.faq5_a: Yes. Within the first 30 days of the first payment — a full refund, no questions. After that — prorated to the time used (we refund the rest). Write to pomoc@obskura.audio.
wsparcie.faq5_q: Can I get a refund for an unused period?
wsparcie.faq6_a: Cards (Visa, MC, Amex), BLIK, Przelewy24, Google Pay, Apple Pay. We don't accept cryptocurrencies. VAT invoices are issued automatically after every payment (PDF in your email and in your Account).
wsparcie.faq6_q: What payment methods do you accept?
wsparcie.faq7_a: On the login screen click "Forgot password". The reset link expires after 30 minutes (security). If the email doesn't arrive within 5 minutes — check SPAM, then write to us.
wsparcie.faq7_q: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
wsparcie.faq8_a: Yes. The Solo plan supports 2 devices at once, the Clan plan — 6 devices and 5 profiles (with separate listening histories). You can listen on your phone, laptop, Sonos speaker and in the car at the same time.
wsparcie.faq8_q: Can I use one account on several devices?
wsparcie.faq9_a: Account → Privacy → Delete account. You get an export of all your data in a ZIP by email before deletion. After 30 days (the grace period) the account is irreversibly removed from our databases, including backups.
wsparcie.faq9_q: How do I delete my account?
wsparcie.form_message_ph: The more detail, the faster we can help. Episode number, system, time, screenshot...
wsparcie.form_sub: We reply within 4 hours (usually faster). At night too.
wsparcie.form_urgent: Urgent — there's a scream in 3 seconds, I don't know what to do
wsparcie.hero_lead: If the audio stutters at minute 23, if your friend can't activate an invite, or if you just want to say something — we're here. We read every message.
wsparcie.quick1_desc: 34 questions, 12 guides. You'll solve most things here in a minute.
wsparcie.quick2_desc: Email, chat, Discord. Average response time: 3h 47min.
wsparcie.quick3_desc: Manage your plan, change payment method, cancel with one click.
wsparcie.quick4_desc: Data export, two-step verification, account deletion — all on the user's side.
